title: Roasted Chicken with Italian Flair
description: A classic roasted chicken dish with an Italian twist, featuring intensely roasted flavors and a hint of Brazilian spice.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the Italian seasoning, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Place the chopped onion inside the chicken cavity.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the chicken and sprinkle with chopped onion.
Truss the chicken with kitchen twine and place it in a roasting pan.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as roasted vegetables or mashed potatoes.
